name: screenshot-capture
title: Screenshot / Capture
description: Capture a screenshot of the Game view (Play Mode) or Scene view (Edit Mode) and save it as a PNG file. Returns the file path so Claude can use the Read tool to view the image. Useful for visually verifying game state, UI layout, or debugging rendering issues.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Optional tag prefix for the filename (e.g. 'before-fix', 'ui-check'). If omitted, the filename is 'screenshot_<timestamp>.png'.

parameters.name: superSize
parameters.description: Super-sampling multiplier for higher quality (1-4, default: 1). Only applies to Play Mode captures.
